name: Toaru RPG (mix for Esper, Scientist, Saint and Magician)
description: Okay, this RPG bot must be... Go count alone because it's so much character in my profile history! I also love Toaru, i must put lot of characters into it. (Edit for extra word for thanks for 1000: Toaru is best place, huh?
